law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

  Art. 398. Whoever intentionally inflicts wounds or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and a fine from twenty-six [euros] to one hundred [euros], or with one of those penalties alone.
  In case the offender acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and a fine from fifty [euros] to two hundred [euros].

  Art. 399. If the blows or wounds result in illness or inability to perform personal labor, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and a fine from fifty [euros] to two hundred [euros].
  The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and a fine from one hundred [euros] to five hundred [euros], if he has acted with premeditation.

  Art. 400. The punishment is imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine from two hundred [euros] to five hundred [euros], if the blows or wounds cause an incurable appearing disease, inability to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of use of an organ, or a severe mutilation.
  The punishment is detention from five years to ten years, in case the offender has acted with premeditation.

  Art. 401. When the blows or wounds are intentionally inflicted, but without the purpose to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished with detention from five years to ten years.
  He shall be punished with detention from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows: Person -> Bool
  CausesDeath: Person -> Bool
  PurposeToKill: Person -> Bool
  CausesIncurableAppearingDisease: Person -> Bool
  CausesInabilityToPerformPersonalLaborForMoreThanFourMonths: Person -> Bool
  CausesCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan: Person -> Bool
  CausesSevereMutilation: Person -> Bool
  CausesIllnessOrIncapacity: Person -> Bool
  ActedWithPremeditation: Person -> Bool

  liableArt398: Person -> Bool
  liableArt399: Person -> Bool
  liableArt400: Person -> Bool
  liableArt401: Person -> Bool

  imprisonmentMinDays: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Person -> Int
  fineMinEuros: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEuros: Person -> Int
}

theory T:V {
  ! x in Person:
    liableArt401(x) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(x) &
      ~PurposeToKill(x) &
      CausesDeath(x).

  ! x in Person:
    liableArt400(x) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(x) &
      (CausesIncurableAppearingDisease(x) | CausesInabilityToPerformPersonalLaborForMoreThanFourMonths(x) | CausesCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan(x) | CausesSevereMutilation(x)) &
      ~CausesDeath(x).

  ! x in Person:
    liableArt399(x) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(x) &
      CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(x) &
      ~PurposeToKill(x) &
      ~CausesIncurableAppearingDisease(x) &
      ~CausesInabilityToPerformPersonalLaborForMoreThanFourMonths(x) &
      ~CausesCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan(x) &
      ~CausesSevereMutilation(x) &
      ~CausesDeath(x).

  ! x in Person:
    liableArt398(x) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(x) &
      ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(x) &
      ~CausesIncurableAppearingDisease(x) &
      ~CausesInabilityToPerformPersonalLaborForMoreThanFourMonths(x) &
      ~CausesCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan(x) &
      ~CausesSevereMutilation(x) &
      ~CausesDeath(x).

  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(x) = 8  <=> liableArt398(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(x) = 180 <=> liableArt398(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    fineMinEuros(x) = 26 <=> liableArt398(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(x) = 100 <=> liableArt398(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).

  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(x) = 30 <=> liableArt398(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(x) = 365 <=> liableArt398(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    fineMinEuros(x) = 50 <=> liableArt398(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(x) = 200 <=> liableArt398(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).

  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(x) = 60  <=> liableArt399(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(x) = 730 <=> liableArt399(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    fineMinEuros(x) = 50 <=> liableArt399(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(x) = 200 <=> liableArt399(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).

  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(x) = 180  <=> liableArt399(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(x) = 1095 <=> liableArt399(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    fineMinEuros(x) = 100 <=> liableArt399(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(x) = 500 <=> liableArt399(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).

  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(x) = 730  <=> liableArt400(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(x) = 1825 <=> liableArt400(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    fineMinEuros(x) = 200 <=> liableArt400(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(x) = 500 <=> liableArt400(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).

  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(x) = 1825 <=> liableArt400(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(x) = 3650 <=> liableArt400(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).

  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(x) = 1825 <=> liableArt401(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(x) = 3650 <=> liableArt401(x) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(x).

  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(x) = 3650 <=> liableArt401(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).
  ! x in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(x) = 5475 <=> liableArt401(x) & ActedWithPremeditation(x).
}

case.text: Pieter and Karel have a conflict in a park. Pieter intentionally hits Karel several times with his fists. Karel sustains injuries: a broken nose and bruises on his face. Pieter did not act with premeditation. The injuries did not cause illness or incapacity to perform personal labor.

pipeline.natural_language: Yes. Pieter is liable under Article 398.

pipeline.error: Error: line 131 - colStart 14 - colEnd 19 => Symbol not in vocabulary: karel

questions.text: What is the minimum prison sentence for Pieter?

pipeline.natural_language: The minimum prison sentence for Pieter is 8 days.
